# WCCP Intake — Master List Summary

**Generated:** 2026-05-10
**Source:** `src/data/intake-questions.ts` (auto-generated by `scripts/generate-intake.mjs`)
**Use:** Drives the interactive intake hub at `/intake`.

This is the complete catalogue of every item Kim/Matt need to confirm, supply, decide, or sign off before the West Country Concrete Products site can launch.

---

## Total: 882 items

| Category | Count | Notes |
|---|---:|---|
| photo | 482 | 9 angles × 45 product detail pages = 405; plus 9 priority-1 brand, 9 facility, 11 news, 4 angles × 12 case studies = 48. |
| content-signoff | 208 | Includes 45 products × 3 fields (copy, specs, CAD), homepage, sectors, guides, areas, local SEO pages, legal pages. |
| team | 57 | 9 team members × 6 fields (surname, role, pronouns, bio sign-off, public/private, portrait) + 3 group items. |
| case-study | 48 | 12 case studies × 4 confirmations (real?, permission, copy sign-off, testimonial). |
| operations | 16 | CMP, GA4, Sentry, GSC, Clarity, domain, email, DNS, hosting, launch type, form recipients. |
| accreditations | 15 | Confirm 4 live, chase 4 pending, decide on MPA Precast / Made in Britain, audit FFA-VCS / ConstructionLine / Achilles / CHAS. |
| brand | 15 | Logo vector, palette hexes, typography, social URLs, Companies House details. |
| contact | 14 | Phones, emails, WhatsApp verification, address, geo coordinates. |
| factory | 13 | Silos, water towers, casting beds, batching capacity, fleet size, yard footprint, biogas link. |
| launch | 9 | Date, soft/hard, newsletter, social, email blast, retainer, GBP, redirects. |
| hours | 5 | Mon-Fri, Saturday, Sunday, bank holidays, shutdown dates. |

---

## Priority breakdown

- **P1 (blocking launch):** team identity (surnames/roles), factory specs, accreditation status, contact details, address, hours, logo, CMP decision, GA4, GSC, domain ownership, DNS, hosting, launch date, Priority-1 brand photography, case-study customer permissions, hero photos for every product page.
- **P2 (important, not blocking):** team bios + portraits, news photography, product gallery photos (angles 2-9), copy sign-off across all pages, area pages, sector messaging, Sentry, social media URLs, retainer decision.
- **P3 (nice-to-have):** secondary yard, bank holiday handling, additional grants, additional guides, Microsoft Clarity, post-launch news cadence, brand guidelines doc, local SEO concrete-supplier-* pages.

---

## Source documents driving the list

- `MEETING_AGENDA_THURSDAY.md` — sections 1, 3, 4, 6
- `PHOTOGRAPHY_SHOT_LIST.md` — priorities 1-5
- `src/config/site.ts` — phone/email/address/hours/accreditations
- `src/pages/team.astro` — placeholder team slots flagged with `placeholder: true` and `[Name to confirm]`
- `src/pages/factory.astro` — TODO/blank specs
- 45 `src/pages/products/*.astro` — `📷 Photo needed` placeholders (1 hero + 8 gallery each)
- 12 case study pages and references
- `src/data/news.ts` — `imageDescription` fields (10 news posts)

---

## Re-generation

```sh
cd wccp-site
node scripts/generate-intake.mjs
```

Regenerate any time the site adds product pages, news posts, case studies, or team slots — the script is the single source of truth and will overwrite `src/data/intake-questions.ts`.
